sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105418" key="trixoko/llhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐχο-κόλλημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a depilatory or eye-salve for the eyelashes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
